overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit futuristic city. The character follows pedestrians along a busy sidewalk past the illuminated 'Kabayan' building, then ascends stairs into an elevated plaza featuring a reflective water pool.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk city sidewalk with street traffic

events.description: passes pedestrian with glowing umbrella and yellow plaid shirt standing near building entrance
futuristic sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk following a pedestrian in a pink shirt, occasionally glancing at neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink shirt with patterned shorts walking ahead of ego
pedestrian with yellow plaid shirt holding illuminated umbrella standing near wall

entered.detail: tall building with prominent red neon 'kabayan foods' signage and vertical blue light strips
large illuminated advertisements and holographic displays on building facades across the street
white illuminated barriers with pink and cyan lighting separating sidewalk from street
reflective wet pavement surface mirroring neon lights
tropical trees planted along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous walk along a cyberpunk city street at night. The Kabayan building dominates the left side with bright red neon signage, while illuminated barriers separate the sidewalk from moderate traffic on the right. Various pedestrians walk in the same direction, and the wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon colors of the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with central water feature

events.description: turns left and ascends concrete stairs from street level to elevated plaza
reaches top of stairs and continues walking across the plaza tiles

agents.ego_description: turns left off the sidewalk, ascends stairs into an elevated plaza, then walks around a central water feature

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead toward the far end of the plaza

entered.detail: rectangular pool with dark water reflecting surrounding neon lights and buildings
patterned stone tiles with graffiti markings covering the plaza floor
pink and purple automated vending booths with illuminated displays
concrete stairs leading back down to street level

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the street to an elevated pedestrian plaza by ascending stairs. The environment opens up to reveal a spacious area with a central water pool reflecting the surrounding neon-lit architecture. The crowd thins out, and automated vending machines become visible along the left side as the character explores the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a crowded, neon-drenched city street up into a spacious, reflective elevated plaza. It begins with a walk along a rain-slicked sidewalk dominated by the bright red neon signage of the Kabayan building and the glow of illuminated traffic barriers. As the character moves forward amidst a stream of pedestrians, the camera follows the ascent of a set of stairs that leads away from the street-level bustle. The scene then opens into an expansive pedestrian plaza where the crowd thins and the environment shifts toward a central water pool reflecting the surrounding futuristic architecture. Finally, the view expands to reveal automated vending machines lining the left side as the character explores the open, luminous space.
